special_mechanics.name: Wall-Jump
special_mechanics.description: Hagane can execute wall-jumping as part of his platforming move set

special_mechanics.name: Flying Jump Kick
special_mechanics.description: Hagane can perform flying jump kicks as an attack/traversal move

special_mechanics.name: Somersaults
special_mechanics.description: Hagane can execute somersaults for mobility

special_mechanics.name: Charge Attacks
special_mechanics.description: Hagane can perform charge attacks with various weapons

special_mechanics.name: Weapon Switching
special_mechanics.description: Player can switch between four weapons: sword, chain, shuriken, and grenades

special_mechanics.name: Magic Attacks
special_mechanics.description: Limited magic attacks available that clear the screen of enemies

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. Wikipedia source provides gameplay mechanics description but lacks specific numerical physics parameters. Reviews praise controls and variety of moves but no technical documentation available for movement values, gravity, acceleration, or sub-pixel system implementation.
